allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking turns metacognitive questioning into disciplined probing of evidence, assumptions, and argumentative weak spots.
allies.source_quote: The Socratic method and Critical Thinking: MCQ is the engine behind the Socratic Method.

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps metacognitive questioning move beyond isolated facts and ask how the parts hang together before committing.
allies.source_quote: MCQ is essential for understanding the structure and dynamics of a system. It forces the thinker to look beyond facts and see how things hang together.

allies.rationale_text: Experimentation keeps metacognitive questioning honest by turning reflection into testable next moves instead of endless introspection.
allies.source_quote: The model is misused when reflective questions keep postponing commitment, experimentation, or ownership instead of sharpening the next concrete move.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes metacognitive questioning ceremonial by asking questions that protect the current story instead of challenging it.
antagonists.source_quote: MCQ directly challenges the natural human tendency to process information to get a conclusion we want.

antagonists.rationale_text: Anchoring weakens metacognitive questioning when the first framing or answer keeps pulling the inquiry back to the same assumptions.
antagonists.source_quote: Persisting in using familiar frames that are unhelpful or misleading for genuinely novel problems.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Metacognitive-questioning conflicts with simplification when recursive self-questioning adds deliberation overhead that degrades time-pressured decisions.
structured_tensions.source_quote: metacognitive-questioning conflicts with simplification (simplification) when recursive self-questioning adds deliberation overhead that degrades time-pressured decisions.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Metacognitive-questioning conflicts with confidence-calibration when constant questioning produces paralytic doubt that undermines well-founded judgments.
structured_tensions.source_quote: metacognitive-questioning conflicts with confidence-calibration (confidence calibration) when constant questioning produces paralytic doubt that undermines well-founded judgments.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strong on guided self-audit, systems-aware questioning, and anti-autopilot pressure, so the file preserves that bounded first-order surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor reflection relations beyond the strongest current-vocabulary links around questioning discipline and anti-frame lock.
open_questions: Prompt-engineering material is source-real, but the retained set favors cleaner current-vocabulary neighbor models already curated in this repo.
